content: The inside diameter of a sampler tube is 50 mm. The inside diameter of the cutting edge is kept such that the Inside Clearance Ratio (ICR) is 1.0% to minimize the friction on the sample as the sampler tube enters into the soil. The inside diameter (in mm) of the cutting edge is _________. (round off to two decimal places)
explanation:
Inside diameter sampler tube $=50 \mathrm{~mm}$

Inside clearance = 1 %

Inside clearance,

$$ \begin{aligned} & C_i=\frac{D_3-D_1}{D_1} \times 100 \\\\ & 1=\frac{50-D_1}{D_1} \times 100 \\\\ & D_1=49.5 \mathrm{~mm} \end{aligned} $$
